channel.title: Hanapha AI Modern Tools
channel.description: Free AI-powered online tools for content generation, prompt optimization, hashtag creation, regex building, SQL query generation, and more.

item.title: AI Content Detector
item.description: Detect AI-generated content quickly and easily online.

item.title: AI Prompt Optimizer
item.description: Improve and optimize AI prompts for better results.

item.title: Blog Title Generator
item.description: Generate catchy and SEO-friendly blog titles instantly.

item.title: Hashtag Generator
item.description: Create trending hashtags for social media content.

item.title: JSON AI Formatter
item.description: Format and beautify JSON data with AI assistance.

item.title: Prompt Generator
item.description: Generate creative prompts for AI tools and content creation.

item.title: Regex AI Builder
item.description: Build regular expressions using AI assistance online.

item.title: SQL Query Generator
item.description: Generate SQL queries automatically with AI support.

item.title: YouTube Title Generator
item.description: Create engaging YouTube video titles instantly.
